todos.title: NVIDIA Inception portal submission prep: 7 product packets (Domain Experts, Arena, Fieldkit, Cortex, AI Native Platform, NeoSignal, Advisor) in _SPECS/nvidia/portal-submissions.md with form-validated copy + dropdown picks + brand color #0C172C; 7 logo lockups generated (Satori+resvg+Geist, color mark + black wordmarks on white); NVIDIA-tech lists grounded in the 63-chapter DGX Spark field-notes book (NIM, NeMo Framework, Megatron-Bridge, TransformerEngine, TensorRT-LLM, Nemotron 3 Super/Nano 9B v2/Embed 1B v2, CUDA Toolkit not CCCL); company-form.md description rewritten to redesign positioning, 994 chars. Open: drive the portal form in browser; Advisor packet waits on /advisor/ redesign

Push-readiness sweep + roadmap curation: pre-push gates all green (no local-only files in 24 unpushed commits, agent parity, build 59 pages, sitemap/redirect page correct, both marketing exports run, Better Stack roster has no /roadmap/); operator-requested roadmap edits done (Living Model + Workflow docs removed from /adoption/, lane id-sets + Run blurb swept); two new Gemini posters curated + placed on the planned cards (Orionfold Advisor 'PRIVATE COUNSEL' Saul Bass cut-paper, Private Agent Starter Kit 'THE PAPER TRAIL' pastel diorama); operator pushed (51046a3 live) and the CF edge 301 /roadmap/->/adoption/ rule 'roadmap-to-adoption-301' was created in the dashboard (Claude-driven browser, operator-authorized) and curl-verified with query strings preserved

Catalog doorway shipped (IA session continuation): homepage CatalogShelf art-shelf section (SSOT counts 14 apps / 6 distinct models / 3 books + proof-art cover fans) + All-X header actions on /experts/ /cockpit/ /workflows/ /learn/; /advisor/ untouched for the 06-10 redesign; build clean, hub links now above the footer

Top-nav naming + URL refactor (operator picked variant C from live in-browser mockups): nav/footer/routes now Advisor·Workflows·/experts/·/cockpit/·Learn·/adoption/ (page files + flagship/portal ids renamed, id==route); only /roadmap/ was live so it 301s to /adoption/ via astro.config redirect (CF edge 301 owed at go-live for GSC); offer titles Domain Experts + Local AI Cockpit swept through pages, og.ts, llms.txt, export-catalog.ts, NVIDIA portal draft names; build clean 59 pages, dist link-sweep clean

Homepage sprawl section rebuilt as the metro line (operator-approved via live mockups): pain-first hook with explicit line breaks, one animated dashed line with icon stations + Approval gate, proof-card terminus with full-width Open the Workbench CTA; vertical layout on mobile; build clean 59 pages

Hero polish session (browser-use with operator): new hook 'Get an AI team without hiring one' + plain abstract (synced to seo.ts meta + manifest), DGX Spark chip doorway on the hero art, HeroConstellation3D isometric drift restored on the image card (desktop-only, softened 21deg, reduced-motion safe); Lighthouse desktop 100 / mobile 92, LCP element unchanged

Kepler release wave synced from ainative.business: new model card + /models/kepler/ detail page + story 'The run I almost wasted' + fieldkit v0.30 re-sync + trust snapshot; build clean at 54 pages, awaiting operator-gated push
Kepler art pass done (featured-imagery, operator-curated): 'The Third Law' poster cover on the model card + 'Measure first, spend second' comic on the story; both wired + build clean
After the operator-gated push deploys Kepler: run Rich Results Test on live /models/kepler/ + the owed seo-aeo-audit rerun
M7 live admin dashboard (127.0.0.1:8789) — built per specs/2026-06-06-live-admin-dashboard.md
Arena product page sync: 11 light-theme screenshots re-pulled + arena-control-plane (jobs board) folded into /software/arena/ per operator; awaiting operator-gated push

Pitch-aligned radical design finished: flagship pages elevated with real product art, compact NVIDIA Inception band + badge (post-approval copy), stale 'grow 10x' meta/llms.txt purged, committed skills stripped back to local-only; 14 commits staged, awaiting operator-gated push
